◎简　　介  

　　The Ferals is an Australian children's comedy television series produced by the ABC. The show, which ran from 1994 to 1995, featured a mixture of real people and animal puppets known as the "ferals." It was lauded for its irreverent humour and distinctive characters, some of which still feature today on ABC programming.http://www.abc.net.au/children/feral/
